chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Uthman Al-Amri

text: ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن عثمان العمريّ- قدّس اللّه روحه- فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن محمّد بن عثمان العمريّ [قدّس اللّه روحه‌].

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Uthman Al-Amri - may Allah (swt) sanctify his soul - I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari, from Muhammad ibn Uthman Al-Amri - may Allah (swt) sanctify his soul.
